column1:
# Huong dan cai dat nhanh

Buoc 1: Tao tai khoan quan tri tren he thong.
Buoc 2: Cau hinh thong tin cong ty, email, va nguoi dung.
Buoc 3: Import danh sach khach hang tu file CSV theo mau.
Buoc 4: Kiem tra phan quyen vai tro truoc khi van hanh.

# Huong dan su dung co ban

De tao co hoi moi, vao man hinh Pipeline va nhan nut Tao moi.
De cap nhat trang thai deal, keo tha the trong kanban hoac sua truc tiep trong form.
De xem lich su cham soc, mo chi tiet khach hang va vao tab Activity.
Neu gap loi dang nhap, kiem tra email, mat khau, va trang thai tai khoan.
